nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Putbus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Assyrian/Chaldean: from an Arabic-influenced (see Boutros ) form of the personal name Pāṭrōs ‘Peter’ (see Patros ).

variants.name: Boutros
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Samir, Ayman, Amal, Ashraf, Fadi, Fouad, Kamel, Mounir, Nabil, Ramzi, Saad, Sameh.  French Antoine, Camille, Laure, Monique, Odette, Pierre.
Arabic (Egypt, Lebanon, and Syria): from the Arabic personal name Butros, Greek Petros (see Peter ), found among Christians.

en.lifeSummary: Woizlava von Putbus was born about 1180, in Putbus, Rügen, Pomerania, Prussia, Germany. She married Borante Podebusk von Putbus I in 1214, in Putbus, Rügen, Pomerania, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter.

ja.lifeSummary: Woizlava von Putbusは約1180年にドイツフレイスタアト プレウssンポンメルンルuジェンプウトブスで生まれた。1214年にドイツフレイスタアト プレウssンポンメルンルuジェンプウトブスでBorante Podebusk von Putbus Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Woizlava von Putbus(은)는 대략 1180년 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 폼머 u겐 풋버스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1214년 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 폼머 u겐 풋버스에서 Borante Podebusk von Putbus I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Woizlava von Putbus родилась около 1180 г. в местности путбус, рuджен, поммирн, Пруссия, Германия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Borante Podebusk von Putbus I в 1214 г. в местности путбус, рuджен, поммирн, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.
